channel.title: 寂照
channel.description: 在尘世中修行，在修行中自在

item.title: The Path to Awakening: Breaking Life's Dream 🌟

item.title: Returning Hearing to Self-Nature: The Path of Ear-Root 🪷

item.title: From Panic to Peace: The Art of Awareness 🌿
item.description: In the midst of worldly chaos, sudden panic can feel like a bottomless abyss. However, from a Zen perspective, these tur
